title: Xtra Buttery Peruvian Fish Fillet Lomo Saltado
description: A dairy-free friendly Peruvian dish featuring fish fillet, long fermentation dough, and a buttery glassy jelly sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe is easy to make and serves 4 people.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the fish fillet into small pieces and season with salt and pepper.
In a large pan, melt the butter over medium heat and add the garlic and ginger.
Add the fish pieces to the pan and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and vinegar.
Add the soy sauce mixture to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the long fermentation dough to the pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes.
Remove the pan from the oven and stir in the chopped scallions.
Serve the fish hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
